emails.subject: Re: Real Time
emails.body: Re: Real Time I'm not sure why you're seeing a price of $65.70 come through on this deal, but I'm looking at the deal in EnPower right now and I see a price of $65. If you could let me know what report is showing the incorrect price, I might be able to figure out why. Thanks, Kate Judy Dyer@EES 04/17/2001 08:16 AM
